column1: # bobyqa_convergence.csv -- BOBYQA reference optima + eval counts for
# the derivative-free bound-constrained convergence and eval-count pins.
#            of M.J.D. Powell's original BOBYQA Fortran; behaviorally
#            authoritative reference). Driver settings: initial step
#            maxeval = 1e5. Objective and bound expressions match the
# convention: box bounds lower <= x <= upper; an infinite bound is an
#            unconstrained side. No general constraints. An infeasible
#            start is projected into the box before the solve.
# note:      fopt / xopt are BOBYQA's ACTUAL converged values from the
#            recorded start; fgap is measured against the published GLOBAL
#            optimum ftarget. BOBYQA is a local method: hs002 from its
#            standard start settles in the negative-x0 Rosenbrock-valley

column2: so its fgap is large by

column1: #            design -- the eval count and converged point remain the
#            authoritative local reference for that start.
# columns:   <name>_x0      -- start point handed to BOBYQA
#            <name>_rhobeg  -- initial trust-region step handed to BOBYQA
